text: Research and development investment intensity cannot be assessed as R&D expenses are reported as not available across all quarterly income statements provided (Q1-Q3 2025 and Q3 2024). This data limitation prevents analysis of the company's technology and innovation spending relative to revenue, which is particularly relevant given the competitive dynamics in the global payments industry and the importance of digital platform investments.
